arts.ttl: Liverpool receive Alexander Isak transfer approval as Arne Slot sent firm Darwin Nunez message
arts.sum: Liverpool legend John Aldridge delivers his verdict on Alexander Isak to Anfield and issues a firm warning to misfiring Reds centre-forward Darwin Nunez.

arts.sum: Liverpool host Newcastle United in the Premier League tonight aiming to move a step closer to title success. Arne Slot’s side extended their lead in the title race to 11 points with an impressive 2-0 win at Manchester City on Sunday. arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot given touchline ban and huge fine by FA after Everton chaos
arts.sum: Arne Slot has been given a two-match with his assistant Sipke Hulshoff also suspended and both Liverpool and Everton fined

arts.ttl: Newcastle United get transfer budget update after Yasir Al-Rumayyan summer plan talks
arts.sum: And Newcastle look like they have moved to the front of the queue to sign Malaga youngster Antonio Cordero with the 18-year-old in line to become one of the first signings ahead of the 2025/26 season. With Newcastle looking to add a host of young players like Cordero in the summer and recent arrivals such as Irish whizzkid Kyle Fitzgerald and Baran Yildiz, a fresher line of back-up players is set to be made available to Howe moving forward.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hit with extended ban after Everton vs Liverpool rant as FA release statement
arts.sum: Arne Slot got himself into hot water after the Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park, and the Liverpool manager has now learned the punishment he will face following the match

arts.ttl: Arne Slot banned for abusing referee Michael Oliver after Liverpool’s chaotic derby win over Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has been banned for two games after being sent off at the end of the Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot discovers touchline BAN decision - with his No 2 handed the same punishment - after referee spat in last Goodison Park Merseyside derby
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has discovered the length of his touchline ban after being sent off following the Merseyside derby earlier this month.
